title: Baden bei Wien, Lower Austria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Baden bei Wien, Lower Austria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Baden bei Wien is a city in Lower Austria with a population of 26,286. A historic spa town south of Vienna, known for its thermal springs, Biedermeier architecture, the Beethoven House, and the beautiful Rose Garden.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
